title: FileLister
excerpt: A powerful duplicate file management tool for macOS and cross-platform use.
full_description: FileLister is a specialized utility designed to regain storage space by identifying and managing duplicate files. It uses deep cryptographic hashing (SHA-256) to ensure 100% accuracy, moving beyond simple name or size comparisons. It supports local drives, external storage, and cloud-synced folders like OneDrive or Google Drive.
advantages: Zero false positives with hash verification
pitfalls: High RAM usage on multi-million file scans

roadmap.task: Native macOS Swift/SwiftUI implementation
SHA-256 cryptographic duplicate detection
Cryptographic license system (v1.2.0)
Microsoft Entra App Registration for Graph API
OAuth 2.0 / Device Code flow for OneDrive auth
Graph API file crawler (names, hashes, sizes, paths)
Unified local + cloud duplicate report
Edge case fixes for SHA-256 detection

title: VibeCoding Ideas
excerpt: A public documentation portal for app concepts and implementation roadmaps.
full_description: VibeCoding Ideas is a minimal, content-focused portal designed to publicly document app concepts. It serves as a bridge between rough ideas and full development, providing a space for AI-assisted expansion of descriptions and technical implementation plans.
pitfalls: Requires manual data entry for new ideas

roadmap.task: Portal architecture, design tokens & glassmorphism UI
Dynamic JSON-based card rendering
Modal interaction with full idea detail
Roadmap section per idea in modal
Client-side search & category tag filters
Offline admin screen to draft new ideas as JSON

title: DrawIO to Mermaid Converter
excerpt: A tool to convert visual DrawIO diagrams into maintainable Mermaid.js code.
full_description: This tool aims to bridge the gap between visual diagramming and 'Diagrams as Code'. By converting XML-based DrawIO files into Mermaid.js syntax, it allows developers to store diagrams directly in their Git repositories in a readable, diff-able text format.
advantages: Eliminates binary/image file bloat in Git
pitfalls: Complex DrawIO shapes may not map 1:1
Styling/Colors might be lost in translation
DrawIO's nested group structures are complex

roadmap.task: XML parser: unpack mxGraphModel compressed format
Shape & connection mapping rules → Mermaid syntax
Split-screen UI (paste XML left, live Mermaid right)
CLI wrapper (Node/Python) for Git hooks & CI pipelines

title: Agenda Creator
excerpt: Smart workshop and meeting organizer that optimizes for participant availability.
full_description: Agenda Creator automates the coordination of complex workshops and meetings. It collects topics from participants, analyzes their availability, and intelligently finds the best time slot. It then organizes the full workshop schedule and sends automated calendar invites and organized emails.
advantages: Optimizes time spent in the office
Ensures all high-priority topics are covered

roadmap.task: Project scaffold (Next.js 15 + TypeScript + Tailwind + shadcn/ui)
Organizer form: create workshop + optional Excel upload
Participant portal with one-click link & availability input
Smart scheduling constraint solver engine
Auto-send final agenda + ICS calendar invites via email
Organizer dashboard
Google Workspace & Microsoft 365 calendar integration
AI-assisted topic clustering & agenda building

title: PropInsight
excerpt: Automated real-estate market analyzer and historical price tracker.
full_description: PropInsight is an intelligent real-estate data aggregator designed to provide a comprehensive overview of local property markets. By autonomously scanning major real-estate portals, it captures and cross-references critical data points including historical pricing, geographic distribution, and visual assets.

roadmap.task: Headless scraper (Playwright) for property listings
PostGIS spatial DB setup for neighborhood grouping
Price-drop tracking engine + push notifications
Web UI dashboard for market analysis
Automated reporting system
